summary: Completed testing of iteration 6 features: ScraperAPI credit tracking on Dashboard and User Management CRUD on Settings page. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Login with credentials arigastro / Arigastro2026!
GET /api/scraperapi/account returns configured:true, request_count, request_limit
Dashboard shows ScraperAPI Kredi Durumu card with progress bar (78% used)
Dashboard shows used/total credits (3,905 / 5,000) and remaining credits (1,095)
Dashboard shows failed request count and concurrent limit
Dashboard has link to ScraperAPI dashboard
Settings page shows Kullanici Yonetimi section with user table
Settings page shows 'Yeni Kullanici' button
POST /api/users creates new user successfully
POST /api/users validates password minimum 6 characters
POST /api/users rejects duplicate usernames
GET /api/users returns user list without password_hash
PUT /api/users/{username}/password changes password successfully
PUT /api/users/{username}/password validates password minimum 6 characters
DELETE /api/users/{username} deletes user successfully
DELETE /api/users/arigastro returns 400 'Kendinizi silemezsiniz' (self-delete protection)
Settings page 'Yeni Kullanici' button opens dialog with username/name/password fields
Settings page create user flow works - user appears in table with toast notification
Settings page password change dialog works - shows username and new password field
Settings page delete user works - trash icon, confirm dialog, user removed from table
seed_data_creation: None - test users created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 features fully tested and working: (1) ScraperAPI credit tracking card on Dashboard showing used/total credits with progress bar, remaining credits, failed requests, and concurrent limit. (2) User Management CRUD on Settings page with Kullanici Yonetimi section, user table, add user dialog, password change dialog, and delete user with self-delete protection. All backend APIs verified: GET /api/scraperapi/account, GET/POST /api/users, PUT /api/users/{username}/password, DELETE /api/users/{username}.
